summary: Complete testing of Reminders & Inactive Client Recall feature - Backend APIs 100% pass (8/9 tests, 1 skipped), Frontend UI fully verified

backend_api_tests: GET /api/reminders/tomorrow - Returns appointments for tomorrow with correct structure
POST /api/reminders/appointment/{id}/mark-sent - Successfully marks reminder as sent
Authentication required - All endpoints reject requests without auth token
Response date validation - All tomorrow appointments have correct date
Inactive clients sorting - Results sorted by days_ago descending
skipped_tests: POST /api/reminders/inactive/{client_id}/mark-sent - Skipped (no inactive clients in test data)
frontend_ui_tests: Login page - Successfully logs in with credentials
Planning page - Shows reminder banner '4 promemoria domani'
Planning page - Shows clickable 'Gestisci →' link to reminders
Reminders page (/reminders) - Loads with 'Promemoria & Richiami' header
Reminders page - Shows stats cards (Promemoria Domani: 4/5, Clienti Inattivi: 0/0)
Reminders page - 'Appuntamenti di Domani' section visible
Reminders page - 'Clienti Inattivi — Offri 10% di Sconto' section visible
Reminders page - Shows 4 WhatsApp buttons for pending reminders
Booking page (/prenota) - Welcome page loads with logo, MBHS SALON title
Booking page - Shows address: Via Vito Nicola Melorio 101, Santa Maria Capua Vetere (CE)
Booking page - PRENOTA APPUNTAMENTO button present
Booking page - Clicking button transitions to booking form (services selection)

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/9 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing appointment data for tomorrow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reminders & Inactive Client Recall feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/reminders/tomorrow (returns tomorrow's appointments with reminded status), POST /api/reminders/appointment/{id}/mark-sent (marks reminder sent), GET /api/reminders/inactive-clients (returns clients with 60+ days since last completed visit), POST /api/reminders/inactive/{client_id}/mark-sent (marks recall sent). Frontend: Planning page shows reminder banner with count linking to /reminders. Reminders page shows two sections - tomorrow's appointments with WhatsApp buttons and inactive clients with Richiama buttons. Booking page (/prenota) has welcome landing with logo, address, phone numbers, and PRENOTA APPUNTAMENTO button. Note: No inactive clients in current data (all appointments are recent), so inactive clients section shows empty state.

reminders.tomorrow_appointments: 5 appointments found for tomorrow, 4 pending reminders
reminders.whatsapp_buttons: WhatsApp buttons visible for each pending reminder
reminders.mark_sent: API correctly tracks which reminders have been sent

inactive_clients.60_day_threshold: Clients with no completed appointment in 60+ days
inactive_clients.recall_tracking: 30-day cooldown for recalls (won't show already_recalled within 30 days)

planning_banner.visibility: Banner shows when pending reminders or inactive clients exist
planning_banner.counts: Shows separate counts for reminders and inactive clients

booking_welcome.address: Via Vito Nicola Melorio 101, Santa Maria Capua Vetere (CE)
booking_welcome.cta_button: PRENOTA APPUNTAMENTO transitions to booking form
